title: Southern California chemical tank at risk of exploding as 50,000 residents are ordered to evacuate
summary: Authorities are working to neutralize a 15,000-gallon chemical tank in Southern California to prevent explosion as 50,000 residents evacuate. The effort to reduce the tank's explosive potential is critical to public safety.
content: The goal is to neutralize a nearby 15,000-gallon tank and reduce its explosive potential if the smaller tank failed.

zh.title: 南加州化学储罐面临爆炸危险，5万居民被命令疏散
zh.summary: 当5万居民撤离时，当局正在努力使南加州一个15,000加仑的化学储罐无害化，以防止爆炸。降低储罐爆炸潜力的努力对公共安全至关重要。

title: 'I never heard of the Strait of Hormuz before this': How one medical supply CEO is navigating the oil price shock
summary: Medical supply company Gentell is navigating business challenges caused by the Strait of Hormuz oil price crisis, which disrupts its global supply chain. The geopolitical volatility is affecting raw material sourcing for medical companies.
content: Medical supply company Gentell sources raw materials from around the world, and the crisis at the Strait of Hormuz is causing volatility for its business.

zh.title: "我之前从未听说过霍尔木兹海峡"：一位医疗用品首席执行官如何应对油价冲击
zh.summary: 医疗用品公司Gentell正在应对由霍尔木兹海峡油价危机造成的业务挑战，该危机扰乱了其全球供应链。地缘政治波动正在影响医疗公司的原材料采购。

title: Is the stock market closed on Memorial Day? Does the post office deliver mail?
summary: The Memorial Day holiday weekend will affect stock and bond market operations, with full closures and modified schedules. Investors should plan accordingly for the holiday period.
content: The holiday weekend will affect the stock and bond market. Here’s what you need to know.

zh.title: 阵亡将士纪念日股市关闭吗？邮局会送邮件吗？
zh.summary: 阵亡将士纪念日周末将影响股票和债券市场运营，包括完全关闭和修改的时间表。投资者应为假期期间的情况进行相应的规划。

title: Trump says there’s no rush as deal to end Iran war, reopen Strait of Hormuz appears close
summary: The U.S. appears close to an agreement with Iran that would end the war and reopen the strategic Strait of Hormuz, with Trump saying there's no pressure to rush negotiations. A resolution could ease global oil prices and geopolitical tensions.
content: The U.S. appears close to reaching an agreement that would end the war with Iran and reopen the strategic Strait of Hormuz, according to reports Sunday.

zh.title: 特朗普表示无需匆忙，结束伊朗战争并重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的协议似乎即将达成
zh.summary: 美国似乎即将与伊朗达成协议，以结束战争并重新开放战略性的霍尔木兹海峡，特朗普表示谈判无需匆忙推进。一项解决方案可能会缓解全球油价和地缘政治紧张局势。

title: Trump says Iran negotiations proceeding in 'orderly and constructive manner;' warns against rushing
summary: President Trump stated that Iran negotiations are proceeding in a constructive manner while maintaining a U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports. The blockade will remain in place until an agreement is reached and signed.
content: The president said the U.S. naval blockade of Iranian ports would remain in effect until "an agreement is reached, certified, and signed."

zh.title: 特朗普称伊朗谈判以"有序且建设性的方式"进行；警告不要仓促
zh.summary: 特朗普总统表示，伊朗谈判正在以建设性的方式进行，同时美国维持对伊朗港口的海军封锁。在达成并签署协议前，封锁将继续实施。

title: 'The Mandalorian and Grogu' is Disney's lowest-ever Star Wars film opening
summary: Disney's "The Mandalorian and Grogu" earned an estimated $82 million domestically in its opening three days, marking the lowest-ever opening for a Star Wars film. The weak debut signals potential fatigue in the Star Wars franchise.
content: Disney's "The Mandalorian and Grogu" tallied and estimated $82 million in domestic ticket sales through its first three days in theaters.

zh.title: 《曼达洛人与格鲁古》创迪士尼《星球大战》电影历史最低首映纪录
zh.summary: 迪士尼《曼达洛人与格鲁古》首映三天国内票房约8200万美元，创《星球大战》电影历史最低首映纪录。疲弱的首映表明《星球大战》特许经营可能面临审美疲劳。

title: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
summary: Americans continue experiencing financial anxiety due to persistent inflation and high debt levels limiting their spending flexibility. Nonprofits are increasingly stepping in to provide debt management assistance.
content: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.

zh.title: 美国人陷入债务和物价压力下的财务困境
zh.summary: 美国人持续经历财务焦虑，因为持续的通货膨胀和高债务水平限制了他们的支出灵活性。非营利组织越来越多地介入提供债务管理协助。

title: Barriers grow for international students seeking U.S. jobs: The 'American dream ... is collapsing'
summary: International graduates face mounting obstacles to U.S. employment from a weak hiring market and stricter immigration policies, making their American dream significantly harder to achieve. The barriers threaten the U.S. talent pipeline.
content: International graduates say a weak hiring market and changing immigration rules make it harder for them to achieve their American dream of working in the U.S.

zh.title: 国际学生在美国求职面临的障碍加剧："美国梦正在崩溃"
zh.summary: 国际毕业生面临美国就业障碍不断增加，因为就业市场疲弱和移民政策更严格，使他们的美国梦难以实现。这些障碍威胁到美国的人才管道。

title: I’ve worked with over 1,000 kids—the ones with the best people skills use these 6 phrases
summary: Child life specialist Kelsey Mora, who has worked with over 1,000 kids, identifies six phrases that distinguish strong communicators from people-pleasers. Developing genuine people skills requires specific communication patterns.
content: "Strong people skills are not the same as people-pleasing," says child life specialist and therapist Kelsey Mora, who's supported thousands of kids and families.

zh.title: 我与1000多名儿童合作过——人际交往能力最强的孩子使用这6个短语
zh.summary: 儿童生活专家凯尔西·莫拉与1000多名儿童合作过，她指出了区分强有力沟通者和讨好者的六个短语。发展真正的人际交往能力需要特定的沟通模式。

title: Boosting retirement savings has a less-appreciated benefit
summary: Financial advisors highlight an often-overlooked benefit of boosting retirement savings beyond the obvious accumulation of funds. The dual advantage provides additional value to savers.
content: Saving more money has a dual benefit that often goes unnoticed, according to financial advisors.

zh.title: 提高退休储蓄有一个容易被忽视的好处
zh.summary: 财务顾问强调了提高退休储蓄的一个经常被忽视的好处，超越了显而易见的资金积累。这个双重优势为储户提供了额外价值。

title: Stocks are riding an earnings hot streak — but investors are facing a summer that’s rife with risks
summary: U.S. stock markets are at record highs on strong earnings results heading into summer, but investors should brace for potential volatility in the months ahead. Multiple economic factors could create choppy trading conditions.
content: The U.S. stock market has arrived at the unofficial start to summer with major benchmarks sitting at record highs. But a few factors could make for a bumpy ride in the months ahead.

zh.title: 股市正在经历盈利热潮——但投资者面临风险重重的夏季
zh.summary: 美国股市因强劲的盈利结果创造了历史新高，但投资者应该为未来几个月的潜在波动做好准备。多个经济因素可能会造成交易波动。

title: Top Wall Street analysts like these dividend stocks for steady income
summary: Top Wall Street analysts are recommending dividend stocks as a reliable income source for investors seeking stability amid market uncertainty. Dividend-paying companies offer consistent returns regardless of market direction.
content: Amid ongoing uncertainty, investors seeking consistent income can consider adding dividend stocks to their portfolios.

zh.title: 华尔街顶级分析师看好这些分红股票以获得稳定收入
zh.summary: 华尔街顶级分析师推荐分红股票作为可靠的收入来源，适合寻求在市场不确定性中稳定性的投资者。分红公司无论市场方向如何都提供一致的回报。

title: China tech plays to ride out macro volatility
summary: Analysts recommend Chinese artificial intelligence stocks as a resilient bet against macro volatility despite China's slower economic growth. AI exposure provides growth potential in the Chinese tech sector.
content: The China stock play right now is to focus on artificial intelligence-related names, regardless of the slower economic growth, several analysts said.

zh.title: 中国科技股应对宏观波动
zh.summary: 尽管中国经济增长放缓，分析师推荐中国人工智能股票作为应对宏观波动的有效投资。AI敞口为中国科技部门提供增长潜力。

title: These companies have cash and are liked on Wall Street
summary: Wolfe Research identified companies with market caps above $250 million that rank in the top quintile for net cash position relative to market value. These well-capitalized firms are well-regarded by Wall Street.
content: Wolfe Research screened for companies with market caps above $250 million that are in the top quintile for net cash-to-market cap ratio.

zh.title: 这些公司现金充足且获得华尔街青睐
zh.summary: 沃尔夫研究公司筛选出市值超过2.5亿美元、净现金头寸相对市值在前五分位数的公司。这些资本充足的企业获得华尔街的看好。

title: ‘We have longevity in the family’: My sister is turning 67. Should she wait until 70 to claim Social Security?
summary: A 67-year-old woman faces the decision of whether to claim Social Security now or wait until age 70, with family longevity history suggesting waiting could yield higher lifetime benefits. The choice involves weighing immediate income against delayed but enhanced retirement payments.
content: “Others say she should start at full retirement age.”

zh.title: "我们家族很长寿":我的妹妹快67岁了。她应该等到70岁再申领社会保障吗?
zh.summary: 一位67岁的女性面临着现在申领社会保障还是等到70岁的决定,基于家族长寿的历史,等待可能会产生更高的终身收益。这项选择涉及在即刻收入和延迟但更高的退休金之间的权衡。

title: Move over, seltzer. Non-carbonated drinks are taking the spotlight
summary: Non-carbonated alcoholic beverages like Surfside and BeatBox are gaining market share from hard seltzers, particularly among Gen Z consumers who are shifting their preferences toward alternative drinks.
content: Non-carbonated alcoholic drinks like Surfside and BeatBox are stealing "share of throat" from hard seltzers, particularly among Gen Z.

zh.title: 让开,苏打水。无气饮料正在成为焦点
zh.summary: 像Surfside和BeatBox这样的无气酒精饮料正在从硬苏打水中夺取市场份额,特别是在改变偏好、转向替代饮料的Z世代消费者中。

title: Russia hits Ukraine with hypersonic missile in one of the war's biggest attacks on Kyiv
summary: Russia conducted one of the war's largest attacks on Kyiv using the Oreshnik hypersonic missile, which has intercontinental range and nuclear-weapons capability.
content: The Oreshnik missile has a range of several thousand kilometers and is capable of carrying a nuclear warhead.

zh.title: 俄罗斯用超音速导弹袭击乌克兰,这是战争中对基辅最大规模的攻击之一
zh.summary: 俄罗斯使用具有洲际射程和核武器能力的Oreshnik超音速导弹,对基辅发动了战争中最大规模的攻击之一。

title: I’m 67. Our family trust earns $300,000 annually for my kids. How do I ensure they won’t get killed on taxes?
summary: A 67-year-old with a family trust generating $300,000 annually seeks tax optimization strategies, considering distributing all income to their children to minimize the trust's tax burden.
content: “My thought is to distribute all of the income to my children each year so that the trust itself pays little to no tax.”

zh.title: 我67岁了。我们的家族信托每年为孩子们赚取30万美元。我如何确保他们不会在税收上吃大亏?
zh.summary: 一位67岁的老人拥有每年产生30万美元收入的家族信托,正在寻求税收优化策略,考虑将所有收入分配给子女以最小化信托的税收负担。

title: 'Shameful' more spent on benefits than jobs for young people, says Milburn
summary: Analyst Alan Milburn criticizes government policy for allocating more funding to welfare benefits than job creation programs for young people, calling for system reforms.
content: Reforms are needed of the welfare system to tackle the high numbers of young people not in work or education, says Alan Milburn.

zh.title: 米尔本称对年轻人的福利支出超过就业计划令人"可耻"
zh.summary: 分析师艾伦·米尔本批评政府政策为年轻人分配的福利资金多于工作创造计划,呼吁进行系统改革。

title: ‘My husband is leery of my plan’: We are both 60 and have $5 million. Is now a good time to dip into our savings?
summary: A couple both age 60 with $5 million in savings faces the decision of whether it is financially prudent to begin spending down their accumulated wealth for lifestyle improvements.
content: “We have been scrimping for a long time.”

zh.title: "我丈夫对我的计划持怀疑态度":我们都60岁了,有500万美元。现在是动用我们储蓄的好时机吗?
zh.summary: 一对都60岁、拥有500万美元储蓄的夫妇面临着是否明智地开始花费他们积累的财富来改善生活方式的决定。

title: The Middle East war is testing the Gulf's ambitions to become an AI hub
summary: The Gulf region's ambitions to become a global AI hub face challenges from Middle Eastern conflict and persistently high energy costs, which impact the viability of data center operations.
content: Attacks on data centers in the Middle East and persistently high energy prices have altered the calculus for operators of the facilities, analysts say.

zh.title: 中东战争正在考验海湾成为人工智能中心的雄心
zh.summary: 海湾地区成为全球人工智能中心的雄心面临中东冲突和持续高企能源成本的挑战，这影响了数据中心运营的可行性。

title: City's living costs drive workers to food banks
summary: Cambridge's high living costs are forcing employed residents to rely on food bank support, according to local charity assessments. This highlights growing affordability challenges even for working people.
content: It is so expensive to live in Cambridge a charity says people with jobs need subsidised food.

zh.title: 城市生活成本推动工人依靠食物银行
zh.summary: 剑桥高昂的生活成本正迫使在职居民依赖食物银行支持，据当地慈善机构评估。这突显了即使是在职人群也面临越来越严峻的可负担性挑战。

title: 'Six eggs used to be £1' - why everyday essentials cost so much more now
summary: Supermarket prices for everyday items like eggs have surged since 2022, when a six-pack cost £1. The article examines what's driving these increases and whether retailers are profiteering.
content: Six supermarket brand eggs cost £1 in 2022. How much are they now, why have they gone up, and is anyone profiteering?

zh.title: "六个鸡蛋曾经只要1英镑" - 为什么日常必需品现在贵这么多
zh.summary: 自2022年以来，超市日常商品（如鸡蛋）的价格大幅上涨，当时六个一盒的鸡蛋只需1英镑。该文章探讨了推动这些价格上涨的因素，以及零售商是否在抬价。

title: Secret Service shoots person near White House, bystander also shot, law enforcement official says
summary: Secret Service reported shots fired one block from the White House near 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue NW, with at least one person and a bystander shot. The incident occurred during what appears to be a security situation at the nation's capital.
content: Secret Service said it was "aware of reports of shots fired near 17th Street and Pennsylvania Avenue NW" — one block from the White House.

zh.title: 特勤局在白宫附近开枪打伤一人，执法官员称旁观者也中枪
zh.summary: 特勤局报告称在白宫附近一个街区（宾夕法尼亚大道西北17街附近）发生枪声，至少有一人和一名旁观者中枪。这次事件发生在美国首都的一场安全状况期间。
